metadata.description: Key player injury and availability tracker for World Cup 2026
metadata.notes: Data sourced from verified sports news outlets and Transfermarkt. Availability statuses: fit, minor_concern, doubt, major_doubt, injured, long_term_injured, retired_international

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Returned to team training Feb 13, declared available

players.source: beIN Sports, Managing Madrid, FOX Sports, SI.com - Feb 2026
players.notes: Sprained left knee Dec 2025, returned early for Supercopa final. Recurring knee discomfort being managed. Expected fit for World Cup barring setback.
Age 35. Experienced campaigner, no significant injury concerns. Key creative player for France.
Midfield anchor for France. Has had minor ankle issues in the past but currently fit and playing regularly for Real Madrid.
Key center-back for both Arsenal and France. No injury concerns. Consistently available.
France's first-choice goalkeeper. Had a wrist injury earlier in the season but fully recovered and playing regularly.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Left match in tears with less than 10 minutes on clock

players.source: beIN Sports, Goal.com, FOX Sports, GB News - Feb 18, 2026
players.notes: Injury worse than first feared. Will miss England's final pre-WC camp. Tuchel described it as 'a race against time'. England opens WC vs Croatia June 17.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Limped off in second half, collision with Santiago Bueno

players.notes: Minor knock, expected available for Tottenham derby. No significant injury concern for World Cup.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Missed training Feb 4 due to illness, also previous calf/facial injuries

players.notes: Multiple minor injuries throughout 2025-26 season. None appear to be long-term concerns. Pattern of minor niggles but consistently returns.
Key creative force for England. Has had minor fitness concerns but currently fit. 2023 Ballon d'Or nominee.
England's midfield engine. No significant injury concerns. Consistent performer for Arsenal.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Confirmed out for approximately one month

players.source: ESPN, FOX Sports, beIN Sports, Tribuna.com - Feb 2026
players.notes: Expected to return by end of February. Should be fit for Finalissima. History of recurring injuries but positive recovery.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Back to near-best form after radiofrequency treatment

players.source: ESPN, Football-Espana, World Soccer Talk - Feb 2026
players.notes: Issue 'practically gone' since November after radiofrequency intervention. Overuse injury that needs ongoing management. Expected fit for WC.

players.injuryType: Stress fracture in right foot (rare bone injury)

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Suffered injury at end of match

players.source: Sky Sports, Arsenal.com, Daily Cannon, Tribuna.com - Feb 2026
players.notes: Surgery on Feb 9, 2026. Out for remainder of domestic season. Slim chances of recovery in time for WC. Would need to be fit by late May for squad selection.

players.injuryType: Inner meniscus tear (arthroscopy, same knee as Nov 2023 injury)
players.source: beIN Sports, Goal.com, Football-Espana, Tribuna.com - Feb 2026
players.notes: Returned to group training Feb 2026 for first time in 5 months. Barcelona targeting March 15 return vs Sevilla. Coach Flick won't rush him. Gavi dreaming of World Cup selection.
2024 Ballon d'Or winner. Suffered ACL tear in Sept 2025. Targeting May/June return. Race against time for World Cup. Spain's most important midfielder.

players.injuryType: Broken left leg and dislocated ankle (returning)

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Getting regular minutes, still finding rhythm after 196 days out

players.notes: Broke left leg in Club World Cup QF vs PSG July 2025. Returned Jan 2026 after 196 days. Still finding rhythm, admits struggling with match sharpness. Planning national team return for March camp.
Germany's most exciting talent. No injury concerns. Key player alongside Musiala for World Cup. Reportedly subject of interest from Real Madrid and Barcelona.
Germany captain. Versatile player (midfield/right-back). No current injury concerns. Leader of the squad.
Reinvented himself as a center-forward at Arsenal. No injury concerns. Key goal threat for Germany.
Experienced center-back. No current injury concerns. Defensive leader for Germany.
9 goals, 5 assists in La Liga 2025/26. Strong form with goals in 3 consecutive matches. Expected to be Brazil's star player at the World Cup.

players.injuryType: Knee surgery (chronic knee problem, previous ACL tear)
players.source: FOX Sports, ESPN, Goal.com, FIFA.com - Feb 2026
players.notes: Age 34. Underwent knee surgery Dec 2025 following previous ACL tear. Ancelotti said he must be '100%, not 80%' to make squad. Race against time.
Versatile attacker for Real Madrid. No injury concerns. Important creative option for Brazil.
Brazil's defensive leader and captain. No current injury concerns. Experienced in major tournaments.
World-class goalkeeper. Has had recurring hamstring problems this season. Liverpool managing his minutes carefully. Expected fit for World Cup.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Scored first goal of 2026 but exited 57th minute with hamstring strain

players.source: Goal.com, SI.com, Al Jazeera, FIFA.com - Feb 2026
players.notes: Age 38. Said 'the most logical thing is that I won't make it' due to age but remains 'excited and motivated'. Likely final World Cup if he plays.
Hero of 2022 World Cup final. No injury concerns. Undisputed starting goalkeeper for Argentina.
Young striker excelling at Atletico Madrid. No injury concerns. Likely to lead Argentina's attack if Messi is unavailable.
Midfield engine and 'Messi's bodyguard'. No injury concerns. Tireless worker essential to Argentina's system.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Suffered knee ligament tear, ruled out for 8+ months

players.notes: Young talent ruled out of World Cup with knee ligament tear requiring 8+ months recovery. Major blow for Argentina's depth.
Ruled out of World Cup with ruptured Achilles tendon. Devastating blow for Argentina's defensive options.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Limped off 81st minute with muscle discomfort, missed penalty earlier

players.source: SportBible, Tribuna.com, GB News, Goal.com - Mar 1, 2026
players.notes: Age 41. Forced off with hamstring concern during 3-1 win. Al Nassr boss Jorge Jesus said it was precautionary. Medical tests ongoing. Expected fit for World Cup even in worst case (3-5 weeks). Would be record 6th World Cup.
Portugal's creative hub. No injury concerns. Consistently one of the most durable players in the Premier League.
Tireless midfielder with exceptional technical ability. No injury concerns. Key player for Portugal's midfield.
Explosive winger. No injury concerns. Important attacking option for Portugal.
World-class center-back. No current injury concerns. Defensive leader for Portugal.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Injured while scoring from penalty spot. 116+ days sidelined.

players.source: FOX Sports, TSN, GB News, Yahoo Sports - Feb 2026
players.notes: Age 34. Joined Napoli from Man City. High-grade lesion in same area as previous surgery. Only 8 Serie A appearances before injury. Could return March but narrow window to regain match fitness.
Belgium's all-time top scorer. No current injury concerns. Enjoying good form at Napoli under Conte.
Explosive young winger. No significant injury concerns. Key attacking threat for Belgium.
Has fully recovered from 2023 ACL tear. Playing regularly as Real Madrid's number one. Expected to be Belgium's starting goalkeeper.
Netherlands captain and defensive leader. No injury concerns. One of the best center-backs in the world.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Played full 90 minutes in each of last 4 appearances

players.notes: Moved to Tottenham Aug 2025 for ~51.8M. Had minor ankle swelling and a suspension (red card vs Liverpool) but no injury concerns. Key attacking player for Netherlands.
Versatile forward in excellent form for Liverpool. No injury concerns. Key attacking option for Netherlands.
Starting center-back alongside Van Dijk. No current injury concerns. Experienced at the highest level.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Pulled out with recurring ankle issue

players.notes: Has battled chronic ankle issues since 2023. Missed significant time this season. When fit, a key midfielder for Netherlands. Fitness remains the main concern for World Cup.
Italy's number one goalkeeper. No significant injury concerns. Experienced in major tournaments.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Missed 3 matches with thigh injury, returning to training

players.notes: Italy's most important midfielder. Mild thigh injury cost him 3 matches. Expected back for upcoming fixtures. No long-term concern for World Cup.
Has fallen behind in Newcastle's midfield pecking order. Linked with Serie A return. Match fitness a minor concern due to limited playing time.

players.source: Liverpool FC, Gazzetta dello Sport - Feb 2026
players.notes: Hugely talented but plagued by injuries. Has barely featured for Liverpool since his move from Juventus. Chronic muscle problems cast doubt on World Cup availability.
One of the best left-sided center-backs in the world. No injury concerns. Key defender for Italy.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Scored match-winning goal in 1-2 away victory

players.notes: Age 40. 5th World Cup. Joined AC Milan from Real Madrid. Winning the World Cup is his final goal before retirement. Performing well in Serie A.
Experienced midfielder. No significant injury concerns. Important part of Croatia's golden generation midfield.
One of the most talented young defenders in world football. No injury concerns. Key player for Croatia's future.
Croatia's first-choice goalkeeper. Hero of 2022 World Cup penalty shootouts. No injury concerns.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Third injury of 2025-26 season. Currently dealing with bursitis near hip.

players.source: ESPN, World Soccer Talk, SI.com - Feb 2026
players.notes: Zero goals in 2026. Bursitis near hip. Pochettino concerned about availability. When fit, 'undroppable' for USMNT. USA are co-hosts, opening June 11.
Versatile midfielder playing in Serie A. No significant injury concerns. Important box-to-box presence for USMNT.
USMNT captain candidate. Has a history of back and hamstring injuries. Currently fit but workload carefully managed. Key leader for the home World Cup.
Son of USMNT legend Claudio Reyna. Hugely talented but injury-prone. Currently fit and building confidence. Could be key creative spark for USMNT.
Dynamic left-back nicknamed 'Jedi'. No injury concerns. One of the Premier League's most dynamic fullbacks.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Sidelined with ankle injury since October

players.source: Gazzetta dello Sport, SI.com, vivaligamx.com - Feb 2026
players.notes: Mexico's star striker. Nightmare season with persistent ankle issues. Underwent surgery, expected back next month. Critical for Mexico's home World Cup campaign.

players.expectedReturn: TBD - surgery could sideline for months

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Only 4 matches played in 2026 due to ankle issues

players.notes: Mexico captain. Battling ankle discomfort since December. Only 4 Fenerbahce matches in 2026. Rumors of potential surgery that could rule him out for months. Major concern for Mexico.
Known as 'Chucky'. Key winger for Mexico. Hamstring injury has been a recurring theme. Expected to recover in time for World Cup.
Age 40. Legendary goalkeeper competing for 6th World Cup. No injury concerns. Emotional leader of Mexico squad.
Experienced striker. Has overcome serious skull fracture in 2020. No current injury concerns. Important veteran presence.

players.injuryType: Right hamstring torn muscle fibre (new), previous ACL tear
players.expectedReturn: TBD (3-6 weeks typical for muscle fibre tear)

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Forced off at 47th minute with new hamstring injury

players.source: Tribuna.com, TSN, Yahoo Sports, SI.com - Feb 21, 2026
players.notes: JUST INJURED. Tore right ACL March 2025 (vs USA). Returned January 2026. Now new hamstring tear. 111 days until World Cup. Canada are co-hosts. Very concerning timing.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Underwent surgery for ruptured hip tendon

players.notes: Key striker for Canada. Surgery to repair ruptured hip tendon. 3-5 month rehab puts World Cup return in jeopardy. Massive blow for Canada's attacking threat.
Young center-back with a broken leg. No firm return timeline. Another defensive blow for Canada.
Starting right-back for Canada. Hamstring injury with no firm timeline. Another injury in Canada's mounting list of concerns.
Creative midfielder and one of Canada's best players. Currently fit. Key to Canada's World Cup campaign.
Age 33. Moved to LAFC from Tottenham. Missed WC qualifying matches with hamstring and foot injuries. Coach managing captain's workload carefully.
World-class center-back at Bayern Munich. No injury concerns. South Korea's defensive anchor.
Exciting young talent at PSG. No injury concerns. Key creative player for South Korea.
Versatile forward playing in the Premier League. No injury concerns. Important attacking option.
Age 33. Egypt qualified unbeaten. Salah scored 9 goals in qualifying. Hamstring injury during AFCON 2026 was more serious than first thought. Reports of possible Liverpool departure.
Breakout star who earned a move to Manchester City. No injury concerns. Key attacking option alongside Salah.
Experienced midfielder. No injury concerns. Veteran presence in Egypt's squad.
Key center-back for Egypt. No injury concerns. Strong in domestic competition.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Came off at half-time with niggles, rested vs Salford

players.source: SI.com, Sports Mole, Manchester City - Feb 2026
players.notes: Norway qualified for first WC since 1998 with perfect 8-0 record. Haaland scored 16 goals in qualifying. 'Fully fit' per Guardiola.
Arsenal captain and Norway's creative star. Fully recovered from 2024 ankle injury. In excellent form. Key partnership with Haaland for Norway.
Powerful striker. No injury concerns. Important backup/partner for Haaland in attack.
Colombia's star winger. Moved to Bayern Munich. Ranked 15th among 100 best players for 2026 World Cup by NYT. No injury concerns.
Age 34. Golden Boot winner 2014 World Cup. 122 caps. No specific injury but workload management needed. Veteran leader for Colombia.
Young striker in excellent form. No injury concerns. Exciting prospect for Colombia's attack.
Defensive midfielder playing in the Premier League. No injury concerns. Key to Colombia's midfield balance.
World-class midfielder. No injury concerns. Uruguay's most important player at the World Cup.
Explosive striker. No injury concerns. Key goal threat for Uruguay.
Had a serious hamstring tear earlier in the season. Has returned to action. Being managed carefully. Uruguay's best defender when fit.
Age 39. Still contributing in MLS. Unlikely to be first-choice but could be part of the squad for experience. Workload management essential.
Was left out of Japan's October 2025 squad due to leg pain after Brighton match. Has returned and playing regularly but being monitored.
Exciting young winger. Had minor ankle issue in Oct 2025 but was still called up. No current concerns.
Experienced midfielder at Liverpool. No injury concerns. Japan's midfield captain.
Creative midfielder. No injury concerns. Key playmaker for Japan.
World-class right-back. No injury concerns. Morocco's most valuable player after 2022 World Cup semifinal run.
Creative playmaker. No injury concerns. Key to Morocco's attack.
2022 World Cup hero. No injury concerns. Morocco's first-choice goalkeeper.
Tireless midfielder who starred at 2022 World Cup. No injury concerns.
Senegal's star player. No injury concerns. Key to Senegal's World Cup campaign.
Age 35. Experienced defender. Playing in Saudi league. Fitness management needed but no specific injury.
Pacey winger in the Premier League. No injury concerns. Important attacking option.
Former Chelsea goalkeeper. No injury concerns. Senegal's first-choice keeper.
Switzerland captain and leader. No injury concerns. Consistently one of the best midfielders in the Bundesliga.
Veteran goalkeeper. No injury concerns. Switzerland's reliable number one.
Key center-back for both Manchester City and Switzerland. No injury concerns.

players.injuryType: Previous ACL injuries (history of knee problems)
players.notes: Has a history of serious knee injuries including two ACL tears. Currently fit and playing but always a concern given his injury history.
Remarkable comeback after cardiac arrest at Euro 2020. No injury concerns. Veteran leader for Denmark.
Young striker with great potential. No significant injury concerns. Denmark's main striker.
Experienced goalkeeper with Leicester Premier League title pedigree. No injury concerns.
Tireless midfielder. No injury concerns. Key to Denmark's midfield discipline.
Age 37. Still scoring regularly for Barcelona. No specific injury but age means workload management is critical. Poland's all-time top scorer.
Creative midfielder. No injury concerns. Key playmaker for Poland.
Came out of retirement to join Barcelona. Experienced goalkeeper. No injury concerns.
Versatile player for Roma. No injury concerns. Young and dynamic.
Serbia's main striker. No injury concerns. Prolific scorer for Juventus.
Serbia's all-time top scorer. Playing well in Saudi league. No injury concerns.
Talented midfielder. No injury concerns. Key creative force for Serbia.
Experienced captain. No injury concerns. Leader and playmaker for Serbia.
Experienced goalkeeper. No significant injury concerns. Australia's reliable number one.
Socceroos captain. No injury concerns. Key midfield leader.
Experienced left-back. No injury concerns. Veteran defender.
Experienced striker. No injury concerns. Important squad player.
Iran's star striker at Inter Milan. No significant injury concerns. Key goal threat.
Experienced winger. No injury concerns. Important player for Iran.
Has had recurring calf and Achilles problems. Currently available but fitness needs monitoring. Important striker for Iran.
Hero of Saudi Arabia's famous win over Argentina at 2022 World Cup. No injury concerns. Key player.
First-choice goalkeeper. No injury concerns. Experienced in major tournaments.
Exciting young forward. No injury concerns. Key goal threat for Saudi Arabia.
2023 Asian Cup Golden Ball winner. No injury concerns. Qatar's star player.
All-time top scorer for Qatar. No injury concerns. Key striker.
Age 35. Qatar's most capped player and captain. Fitness management needed. Veteran leader.
Premier League goalkeeper. No injury concerns. Cameroon's number one.
In-form Premier League forward. No injury concerns. Key attacking threat for Cameroon.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Without a club since leaving Bayern Munich

players.notes: Experienced striker but currently without a club. Match fitness is a concern. Veteran presence.
One of the world's most lethal strikers. No injury concerns. Nigeria's main goal threat.
2024 CAF Player of the Year. No injury concerns. In superb form for Atalanta.
Experienced defensive midfielder. No injury concerns. Key to Nigeria's midfield.
Nigeria's captain. No injury concerns. Defensive leader.
Has a long history of muscle injuries. Currently fit but always a concern. Key midfielder for Ghana.
Exciting, dynamic attacker. No injury concerns. Ghana's most dangerous player.
Experienced forward. No injury concerns. Part of the Ayew football dynasty.
Remarkable comeback after testicular cancer in 2022. Fully recovered. Key striker for Ivory Coast.
Former Arsenal forward. No injury concerns. Important winger for Ivory Coast.
Box-to-box midfielder. No injury concerns. Key player in Ivory Coast's midfield.
Bafana Bafana star. No injury concerns. Key attacking player.
Exceptional goalkeeper. 2024 CAF goalkeeper of the year. No injury concerns. South Africa's first choice.
Creative midfielder. No injury concerns. Bafana Bafana's main playmaker.
Age 35. Tunisia's all-time top scorer. Fitness management needed. Veteran leader.
Young midfielder with Manchester United pedigree. No injury concerns. Tunisia's future star.
Strong defensive midfielder. No injury concerns. Key to Tunisia's midfield.
Former Manchester City star. No injury concerns. Algeria's most talented player.
Had a serious knee injury in 2024 but has returned. Playing regularly for AC Milan. Key midfielder for Algeria.
Creative forward. No injury concerns. Important attacking option for Algeria.
Talented young forward. No injury concerns. Rising star for Algeria.
World-class defensive midfielder. No injury concerns. Ecuador's most valuable player.
Young center-back at a top European club. No injury concerns. Part of Leverkusen's unbeaten squad.
Age 36. Ecuador's all-time top scorer. Fitness management needed but still an important leader.
Age 37. Chile's all-time top scorer. Playing for Udinese. Workload management needed.
Age 43. Legendary goalkeeper. May come out of retirement for one final World Cup. Status unclear.
Anglo-Chilean forward. No injury concerns. Key striker for Chile.
Pacey winger in the Premier League. No injury concerns. Paraguay's key attacking player.
Paraguay's captain. No injury concerns. Experienced defender.
Exciting young talent. No injury concerns. Paraguay's brightest prospect.
Italian-born striker. No injury concerns. Peru's main goal threat.
Experienced winger. No injury concerns. Key attacking option for Peru.
Defensive midfielder. No injury concerns. Anchors Peru's midfield.
Age 39. Former Real Madrid legend. Likely final World Cup. Fitness management needed.
Veteran forward known for 2014 World Cup heroics. No injury concerns.
Young talent playing in England. No injury concerns. Future of Costa Rican football.
Honduras' star forward. No injury concerns. Key goal threat.
Exciting winger playing in Scotland. No injury concerns. Honduras' most dangerous attacker.
Strong midfielder. No injury concerns. Key player for Honduras.
Panama's key striker. No injury concerns. Top scorer in CONCACAF qualifying.
Creative midfielder. No injury concerns. Key playmaker for Panama.
Experienced defender. No injury concerns. Panama's defensive leader.
Pacey winger in the Premier League. No injury concerns. Jamaica's star player.
Remarkable recovery from a serious leg fracture. Currently fit and playing. Physical forward who adds experience.
Solid center-back. No injury concerns. Key defender for Jamaica.
Haiti's star forward. No injury concerns. Key goal threat.
Powerful striker. No injury concerns. Dangerous aerial threat.
Versatile attacker. No injury concerns. Important player for Haiti.
Cape Verde's star player. No injury concerns. Key attacking threat.
Experienced winger. No injury concerns. Important attacking player.
Central midfielder. No injury concerns. Key to Cape Verde's midfield organization.
Uzbekistan's star striker playing in Serie A. No injury concerns. Key player.
Midfielder playing in France. No injury concerns.
Young talent. No injury concerns. Rising star for Uzbekistan.
Jordan's star player. No injury concerns. Key attacker. Led Jordan to 2024 Asian Cup final.
Jordan's top striker. No injury concerns. Important goal threat.
Experienced midfielder. No injury concerns. Key player in Jordan's midfield.

players.expectedReturn: Has returned but managing knee carefully
players.notes: Suffered ACL tear Dec 2023. Long recovery. Has returned to action but knee requires careful management. Austria's captain and most important player.
Experienced midfielder. No injury concerns. Key player for Austria.
Versatile attacking midfielder. No injury concerns. Important creative option.
Energetic midfielder. No injury concerns. Brings intensity to Austria's midfield.
Scotland's captain and key player. No injury concerns. World-class left-back.
Energetic midfielder. No injury concerns. Scotland's driving force in midfield.
Thriving in Serie A. No injury concerns. Key goal threat from midfield for Scotland.
Premier League striker in excellent form. No injury concerns. New Zealand's main goal threat. Having his best ever season.
Young left-back in Serie A. No injury concerns. Key defender for New Zealand.
Key midfielder for New Zealand. No injury concerns.
World-class midfielder at Inter. No injury concerns. Turkey's star player and penalty specialist.
Hugely talented young player at Real Madrid. History of muscle injuries limiting his playing time. Currently fit. Turkey's brightest prospect.
Exciting winger. No injury concerns. Key attacking player for Turkey.
Iraq's star forward. No injury concerns. Key goal threat.
Key midfielder. No injury concerns. Experienced player for Iraq.
Experienced left-back. No injury concerns. One of Iraq's most experienced players.
Experienced center-back. No injury concerns. DR Congo's defensive leader.
Experienced striker. No injury concerns. Key goal threat for DR Congo.
Versatile midfielder. No injury concerns. Important player for DR Congo.

Dutch-Indonesian midfielder. No injury concerns. Key creative player for Indonesia's historic World Cup debut.
Dutch-Indonesian forward. No injury concerns. Key striker for Indonesia.
